claim_text: A system for interactive patent visualization, comprising: at least one user device constructed and configured for network communication with at least one server platform; wherein the at least one server platform is operable to provide an interactive and dynamic graphical user interface (GUI) to the at least one user device; wherein the at least one server platform is operable to access at least one national patent database; wherein the at least one server platform is operable to generate a patent forecast diagram based on patent data from the at least one national patent database; wherein the patent forecast diagram comprises a multiplicity of graphical elements distributed based on a timeline, representing a multiplicity of patent documents, wherein each graphical element represents a patent document; wherein the at least one user device is operable to display the patent forecast diagram via the interactive and dynamic GUI; wherein the interactive and dynamic GUI is operable to instantaneously expand and contract the scaling of the patent forecast diagram based on a user-selected time scale; wherein the at least one server platform is operable to assign each of the multiplicity of patent documents with one of a multiplicity of primary category labels; wherein the at least one server platform is operable to group the multiplicity of patent documents by the multiplicity of primary category labels based on input from the at least one user device; wherein the at least one server platform is operable to receive a selection of at least one assignee; and wherein the at least one server platform is operable to automatically apply at least one color and/or at least one shading to each of the multiplicity of graphical elements representing a multiplicity of patent documents assigned to the at least one assignee upon receiving the selection of the at least one assignee; and wherein the at least one server platform is operable to automatically reduce the opacity of each of the multiplicity of graphical elements representing a multiplicity of patent documents not assigned to the at least one assignee upon receiving the selection of the at least one assignee.

elements.notes: The invention describes an AI claim mapping platform, not specifically an interactive patent visualization system.
No mention of a user device for network communication in the invention description.
The invention does not describe a server platform providing an interactive GUI.
No reference to accessing a national patent database in the invention description.
The invention does not mention generating a patent forecast diagram.
No mention of graphical elements representing patent documents.

elements.element_text: dynamic scaling of patent forecast diagram
elements.notes: The invention does not describe dynamic scaling of a patent forecast diagram.

elements.element_text: assign primary category labels to patent documents
elements.notes: No mention of assigning primary category labels to patent documents.

elements.element_text: group patent documents by category labels
elements.notes: The invention does not describe grouping patent documents by category labels.
No mention of receiving a selection of an assignee.
The invention does not describe applying color or shading to graphical elements.
No mention of reducing opacity of graphical elements.

missing_elements: dynamic scaling of patent forecast diagram
assign primary category labels to patent documents
group patent documents by category labels
summary: The claim describes a system for interactive patent visualization with specific functionalities that are not present in the invention description, which focuses on an AI claim mapping platform.
